thought.text: It seems there's no README file in the root directory. Let me check if it might be located elsewhere in the project structure.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "find /workspace/project -name \"README.md\" -o -name \"README.txt\"", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for README files in the entire project directory"}

summary: Search for README files in the entire project directory
